summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sandbox Module for Asomunicipios Catastral application. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tested successfully including navigation, query execution, sandbox CRUD operations. Fixed two frontend bugs during testing.

issues: Warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility concern but not blocking

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned sandbox test predios during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sandbox module fully tested. All 6 endpoints working: POST /api/sandbox/consultar, GET /api/sandbox/datos, POST /api/sandbox/crear-predio, DELETE /api/sandbox/predio/{id}, DELETE /api/sandbox/limpiar, GET /api/sandbox/estadisticas. Frontend UI with two tabs (Consultas BD and Pruebas Sandbox) working. Access control verified - only administrators can access.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/sandbox/consultar: PASS - Queries production collections with filters, respects limit
backend_endpoints.POST /api/sandbox/crear-predio: PASS - Creates predio in predios_sandbox collection
backend_endpoints.GET /api/sandbox/estadisticas: PASS - Returns production vs sandbox statistics

access_control.admin_access: PASS - Admin can access all endpoints

frontend_ui.navigation: PASS - Sandbox menu visible under Administracion section for admins
frontend_ui.consultas_tab: PASS - Can select collections, apply JSON filters, view results
frontend_ui.pruebas_tab: PASS - Shows sandbox predios table, Create/Delete/Limpiar buttons work
frontend_ui.create_modal: PASS - Form opens, fields editable, creates predio successfully
frontend_ui.limpiar_sandbox: PASS - Clears all sandbox data with confirmation

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: React runtime error when creating predio - Objects are not valid as React child
bugs_fixed_during_testing.cause: Frontend sending empty strings for numeric fields, and error handling trying to render error object directly
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added parseFloat conversion for numeric fields and improved error message handling in crearPredioSandbox function

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: HTML violation - button nested inside button
bugs_fixed_during_testing.cause: Copy button inside expandable row button element
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed outer button to div with cursor-pointer and onClick handler
